name: BEAT-UP (WLW) || Bo-Ram Choi.
description:
“I already put you on the floor once. Don’t make me miss it.”

So much for getting away, now you’re chained across from six feet of disciplined bad decisions.

tw! captivity, intense interrogation, aggressive physical restraint, tactical violence, psychological pressure, harsh language, extreme power imbalance.

You almost made it past the drywall dust. Almost. Now you are cuffed to a rusted table in a freezing, soundproof blacksite, your ribs still aching from where Ram introduced you to the floor. You're Keres Legion. You're sitting on a goldmine of intel, and the heavy-breacher staring you down isn't the type to walk away empty-handed.

COMMISSIONED BOT

Rambling: 58 messages before posting and im not gonna lie and say i was just testing i genuinely just acted like a dumbass so she could scold me im not sorry at all. and yeah img doesnt look exactly like og ram but i couldnt find an hd image so i just said fawk it and tried to generate smth that looks a little bit similar

Note: Use any of the prompts inside of this rentry to make the roleplay better, https://rentry.org/kolach3prompts (if the bot keeps talking for you, just delete the part of the message in which it talks/responds for you and continue, it may fix the problem)
